title: artemisia glauca var. dracunculina
intro: Artemisia glauca var. dracunculina is a variety of the Artemisia glauca plant, a type of shrub that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is also known as Chinese wormwood, and is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, which can help to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and fight against certain types of parasites and infections. In herbal preparations, Artemisia glauca var. dracunculina can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture to support overall health and well-being, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine practices.
